title: Indictment and Impeachment Only Made Him Stronger. Remind You of Anyone?
description: The fate of Ken Paxton, the conservative Texas firebrand, could decide whether Republicans keep control of the Senate.
author: Michael Kruse and Lauren McGaughy

title: Brookings Institution Report: Over 100,000 Family Separations in Trump Crackdown
description: The Brookings Institution suggests that federal statistics are an undercount because immigrant parents are not being asked about or not disclosing their American children.
author: Miriam Jordan and Jeff Adelson

title: In Massie’s Kentucky Primary, Fidelity to Trump Is on the Ballot
description: Representative Thomas Massie, the Republican who wears his rifts with President Trump as badges of honor, is battling Trump-backed challenger Ed Gallrein to keep his seat.
author: Robert Draper

title: Trump Withdraws His $10 Billion Suit Against the I.R.S.
description: The dismissal appears to be part of the Trump administration’s effort to effectively settle the case, which stemmed from the leak of his tax returns in 2019.
author: Andrew Duehren and Alan Feuer

title: Teenagers Arrested After Drive-By Shootings in Austin Injure at Least 4
description: The teenage boys were among three suspects taken into custody in connection with at least 12 shootings across the Texas capital. There was no apparent motive, the mayor said.
author: Edgar Sandoval

title: G.O.P. to Begin Debating Voting Maps in This State. Not Everyone Approves.
description: Under pressure from President Trump, the South Carolina legislature will consider new House districts this week. Some Republicans worry changes could backfire.
author: Eduardo Medina

title: Hegseth to Campaign for a Republican House Candidate
description: Defense Department officials typically stay away from partisan politics to maintain the military’s apolitical image.
author: Eric Schmitt

title: Two Military Jets Collide in Midair at Idaho Air Show
description: Video shared on social media showed the jets striking each other and spinning toward the ground. Four crew members safely ejected before the planes crashed, officials said.
author: Johnny Diaz and Edgar Sandoval

title: Trump’s Approval Sinks Amid Unpopular War, Darkening G.O.P. Prospects
description: With the midterms nearing, President Trump’s approval rating has hit a second-term low as voters question his handling of the economy, according to the latest New York Times/Siena poll.
author: Lisa Lerer, Ruth Igielnik and Camille Baker

title: The Supreme Court’s Voting Rights Decision Spurred Swift Action in Louisiana and Alabama
description: The timing brought the court into the middle of a fight to redraw voting maps across the South, even as some primaries were underway.
author: Abbie VanSickle

title: Americans Are Among Those Affected by Ebola Outbreak, C.D.C. Says
description: A small number of U.S. citizens have been directly affected by the outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, the C.D.C. said on Sunday.
author: Yan Zhuang

title: Conspiracy Trial Will Test Trump’s Aggressive Tactics Against Protesters
description: Prosecutors in Spokane, Wash., are trying three activists who they say conspired to impede federal officers. Legal experts call it a stretch.
author: Anna Griffin

title: Eager for Arms Deal, Taiwan Stresses Need for U.S. Support
description: After President Trump hinted that weapons sales to Taiwan could figure in negotiations with China, officials emphasized their island’s strategic importance.
author: Minho Kim

title: Trump Administration Pushes Narrative of Christian Nation at Prayer Rally in D.C.
description: The day-long prayer event featured speakers from President Trump’s cabinet and a program that drew connections between the nation’s founding and Christianity.
author: Ruth Graham and Elizabeth Dias

title: How a Jared Polis Came to Release Election Denier Tina Peters from Prison
description: Gov. Jared Polis’s decision to commute the sentence of Tina Peters came after months of tense discussions, including one with President Trump.
author: Nick Corasaniti and Jack Healy

title: What to Know About Letlow And Fleming in the Louisiana Senate Race
description: He was defeated in the Republican primary in Louisiana on Saturday. Representative Julia Letlow and State Treasurer John Fleming are now in a runoff for the party’s nomination.
author: Tim Balk

title: Trump Tightens Grasp on G.O.P. as Cassidy Loss Shows Cost of Defiance
description: The defeat showed the president’s dominance in his party, even as a broader range of views about Mr. Trump could be a major Republican liability in the midterms.
author: Tim Balk

title: To Critics, Trump Remarks Reveal a Billionaire Out of Touch
description: The president has never pretended to be an ordinary American, but a recent “truth bomb” has opened him to criticism that he doesn’t grasp the economic strain of his war with Iran.
author: Erica L. Green

title: Kentucky’s Curious Cast of Political Characters
description: The state, where a rebellious Republican faces a tough primary challenge on Tuesday, has an unpredictable political landscape that has produced a long list of surprising figures.
author: Reid J. Epstein

title: The Big Questions About Jeffrey Epstein: What The Times Has Learned
description: Here is what we know about the sexual predator whose secrets spurred an international reckoning over money, power and complicity. Check back for updates.
author: The New York Times
